description: mcpservers.org is a directory site for discovering Model Context Protocol servers, MCP-compatible clients, and reusable agent skills. It organizes listings by category, topic, and remote-server availability, and lets operators submit servers for inclusion.
summary: mcpservers.org exposes a public website that catalogs MCP servers, remote MCP servers, clients, topics, and agent skills; no separate documented developer API, GraphQL endpoint, MCP server, or CLI was found on the domain.
